questions.question_text_full:
Select the most appropriate word for the given group of words.
Something of little value or importance

Select the most appropriate direct form of the given sentence.
He regretted the mistake he had made in his calculations.

options.text: He said, “I regretted the mistake I made in my calculations.”
He said, “I am sorry for the mistake I made in his calculations.”
He said, “He regrets the mistake he made in my calculations.”
He said, “I regret the mistake I made in my calculations.”

questions.correct_option_text: He said, “I regret the mistake I made in my calculations.”

questions.question_text_full:
Parts of the following sentence are given as options. Identify the segment that contains a grammatical error.
No one have ever visited this place before.

Select the most appropriate direct form of the given sentence.
Anshul told me that his mother was not at home and that she would be back the following day.

options.text: Anshul said to me, “My mother is not at home. She will be back tomorrow.”
Anshul said to me, “My mother is not at home. She would be back the following day.”
Anshul said to me, “His mother was not at home. She would be back tomorrow.”
Anshul said to me, “My mother was not at home. She will be back the following day.”

questions.correct_option_text: Anshul said to me, “My mother is not at home. She will be back tomorrow.”
